work_units.title: Schema documentation
work_units.summary: Frontmatter spec, add-pattern flow, counter semantics.

work_units.title: Three starter pattern entries
work_units.summary: Each entry has tuned detection_regex + fixture_good + fixture_bad. Manual hand-grep verifies regex on claude-sail.

work_units.title: Sweep script
work_units.summary: Both modes (session/full), self-test loop, EXCLUDE_PATHS filter (rev2), .events.jsonl append-only log with 10000-line cap (rev2), counter regeneration, helper-or-fallback for safe-swap (rev2), vault export, fail-open semantics.

work_units.title: /end integration
work_units.summary: Two-line opt-in block: if .claude/anti-patterns exists, run sweep with 5s timeout. Fail-open.

work_units.title: Stock templates + bootstrap
work_units.summary: Stock catalog ships with toolkit. /bootstrap-project copies it (copy-if-not-exists). install.sh copies stock-anti-patterns/ to install target.

work_units.title: Shell hook citing catalog (rev2 — pivot from hookify rule)
work_units.summary: PreToolUse shell hook on Write/Edit. Reads $CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT, scans content against each catalog pattern's detection_regex, emits 'Catalog: <id>' warnings on match. Fail-open. Wires hook in settings-example.json. Pivot from rev1 hookify rule (event: write unsupported).

work_units.title: Tests + README
work_units.summary: test.sh Category 4 frontmatter validation for catalog. Idempotency fixture in evals.json. README updates with anti-pattern catalog section.

tier_signal.rationale: ≥6 WUs OR 1+ High WU triggers Full. WU3 is genuinely high-complexity (event log + counter derivation + vault export + atomic writes). Full tier appropriate.
